title: Implement ownership manifest and installed lifecycle
rawUserRequest: 继续推进当前文档工单，并按已授权计划严格完成当前工单的完整生命周期。

declaredIntent.summary: 完成 Ownership Manifest 与完整 Installed Lifecycle，使安装后生命周期以逐文件/区域证据驱动并在不确定时 fail closed。

outOfScope: CI and release evidence independent verification (Work Item 9).
Complexity repayment and installer module decomposition (Work Item 10).
Execution-plan cleanup and final release publication (Work Item 11).
Starting or implementing any later Work Item.

sources.reason: Approved remediation plan, Work Item 8 acceptance.
Repository lifecycle and fail-closed governance rules.
Existing update apply and snapshot behavior.

riskAssessment.reason: Changes are bounded to installed lifecycle evidence and its existing fail-closed consumers; no destructive default is introduced.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized serial implementation of every plan Work Item; this Work Item is next in order.

preReviewWarnings: Reviewers must verify that drift, unknown ownership, partial activation, and rollback failure produce zero writes.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Every installed file and managed region has explicit ownership, installed/current digest, and project-modification facts.
Update proposal/apply evidence includes Work Item linkage, snapshot, migration, recalibration impact, summary, PR handoff, and rollback evidence.
Uninstall preserves evidence and supports detached uninstall, purge export, and final receipt; drift/conflict/half-activation/rollback failure fail closed.
Adopter end-to-end tests and lifecycle documentation verify the complete installed lifecycle.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.
Keep lifecycle evidence canonical, bound by digests, and fail closed on ambiguity.

intent.problem: The installed lifecycle has primitives but does not yet expose a complete, per-file ownership and modification evidence contract across update, rollback, disable/enable, and uninstall.
constraints: Do not silently overwrite project-owned or shared content.
intent.rationale: A canonical ownership manifest and bound fact bundle lets every lifecycle transition make the same conservative decision.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized full serial implementation of the approved remediation plan, including PR, merge, close, and cleanup.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
